text.title: Pattern Bank Tagging Schema Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding Pattern Bank Tagging Schema. Each pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override.

rule.statement: Surface tag is exactly one value from the closed vocabulary (auth | checkout | dashboard | nav | onboarding | settings | profile | search | content | empty-state | error | a11y); custom surfaces are rejected.
rule.rationale: Open vocabularies erode discipline; closed enums make retrieval deterministic and trainable.

rule.statement: Intent tag is exactly one value from (educate | persuade | confirm | warn | delight | navigate | input | feedback); free-text intent is rejected.
rule.rationale: Intent drives many retrieval queries; closed enums prevent overlap and synonym drift.

rule.statement: Pattern_type is one of (anti | good | neutral); 'good' requires evidence the pattern improved a metric, 'anti' requires evidence it harmed.
rule.rationale: Neutral allows storing patterns whose impact is unknown; the trinary keeps the bank honest about evidence level.

rule.statement: Severity 0..4 is sourced from the heuristic-eval-severity-rubric; custom severity values are rejected.
rule.rationale: Two severity scales in one organisation produce contradictory triage; the rubric is the single source.

rule.statement: Every entry carries a source URL or repo path; prose-only source descriptions are rejected.
rule.rationale: Untraceable sources turn the bank into folklore; the link lets reviewers re-litigate.

rule.statement: If preconditions in AGENTS.md "Applies If" do not all hold, OR any "Skip If" disqualifier is true, do NOT run this methodology — emit a skip-record naming the failed precondition and route to the named alternative.
rule.rationale: Methodologies are pre-condition gated; running them out-of-scope produces noise and burns the agent context budget.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold, execute the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml` (or the rule set above for flat methodologies), emit the artefact specified by `content/02-output-contract.xml`, and validate with `scripts/validate-pattern-bank-tagging-schema.py` before returning.
rule.rationale: Tying the entry rule to the validator script closes the loop between policy and machine check.
